title: Everbuild – Evercryl – Emergency Roof Repair Cartridge – Instant Waterproofing Roof Repair – Suitable For Damp and Wet Conditions – Grey – 300ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
RESIN BASED – This fibre-reinforced roof repair compound is formulated from lightfast acrylic polymers to withstand sunlight for longer periods than traditional bitumen.
MULTI-SURFACE REPAIR – Suitable for all common roofing surfaces including concrete, roofing felt, bituminous, corrugated iron, tile, and common roofing non-porous surfaces.
INSTANT WATERPROOFING – Provides repair in even wet and frosty conditions down to -5°C. Effective on wet surfaces and during rainfall.
VERSATILE – Suitable for repairing guttering, down pipes, and vents. Seals and maintains a variety of substrates including brickwork, metal, and slates.
EASY TO APPLY AND RESISTANT – Can be applied with a caulk, sealant, or adhesive cartridge application gun. Highly resistant to algae and fungal growth.
WILL BRIGE CRACKS AND GAPS - Due to the high level of fibre re-enforcement, Evercryl Emergency Roof Repair will bridge small cracks and holes up to 5mm.
